stemHtml: The air loads on the horizontal tailplane (tail load) of an aeroplane in straight and level cruise flight are generally directed:

options.a: upwards and will reduce in magnitude as the CG moves aft.
options.b: downwards and will increase in magnitude as the CG moves aft.
options.c: downwards and will reduce in magnitude as the CG moves aft.
options.d: upwards and will increase in magnitude as the CG moves aft.
